name: T-Mobile US, Inc.
summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. is a U.S. wireless communications and broadband services provider operating under the T-Mobile, Metro by T-Mobile, and Mint Mobile brands. As of December 31, 2025, it serves 142.4 million postpaid and prepaid customers. The company offers wireless service plans, 5G fixed wireless broadband, wholesale wireless services, and sells smartphones, wearables, tablets, 5G broadband gateways, and accessories through retail stores, websites, and third-party distributors.
